full_text:
Chen Yuan 陳元
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Yuan (陳元). Officer of Yang Hu, advised against drinking wine sent by Lu Kang. Chen Yuan may not have existed in history. Chen Yuan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
